parameters.text:
=Here is the raw text from the uploaded PDF document to analyze and parse:

<document_text>
{{ $json.text }}
</document_text>

messageValues.message:
=<instructions>
You are a precise data extraction engine for the Ezverse PDF Scraper tool. 
Analyze the provided document text and return a clean, structured JSON object following this exact schema. 
Do not include any conversational text, introduction, or markdown code block wrappers.
</instructions>

<schema>
{
  "document_title": "Title here",
  "summary": "Brief executive summary here",
  "technical_findings": ["point 1", "point 2"],
  "ethical_findings": ["point 1", "point 2"],
  "conclusion": "Final summary statement"
}
</schema>

headers.user-agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/149.0.0.0 Safari/537.36
